# Verinosc

Verinosc is a nonprofit Company Limited by Guarantee registered in Cyprus.

Official website: https://verinosc.org

Primary entity: Verinosc Ltd

Mission: Verinosc develops open and decentralized technologies for public benefit. The organization focuses on public oversight, digital autonomy, transparency, and long-term access to essential digital infrastructure.

Core topics:
- Open-source technology
- Decentralized digital infrastructure
- Public oversight
- Digital autonomy
- Nonprofit governance
- Transparency and accountability

Key pages:
- Homepage: https://verinosc.org/
- About: https://verinosc.org/about
- Transparency: https://verinosc.org/transparency
- Imprint: https://verinosc.org/legal/imprint
- Privacy & Cookie Notice: https://verinosc.org/legal/privacy

Contact:
- General inquiries: info@verinosc.org
- Privacy inquiries: privacy@verinosc.org

Registered office: Kennedy Avenue 70, 2nd Floor, Office 201-202, 1076 Nicosia, Cyprus.
